mapper.sql: LEFT JOIN CATEGORY c3 ON p.CATEGORY_NO = c3.CATEGORY_NO LEFT JOIN CATEGORY c2 ON c3.PARENT_CATEGORY_NO = c2.CATEGORY_NO LEFT JOIN CATEGORY c1 ON c2.PARENT_CATEGORY_NO = c1.CATEGORY_NO

WHERE p.ADMIN_HIDE_YN = 'N'
AND p.USER_NUM = #{userNum}
AND p.CATEGORY_NO IN ( SELECT CATEGORY_NO FROM CATEGORY START WITH CATEGORY_NO = #{categoryNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y' CONNECT BY PRIOR CATEGORY_NO = PARENT_CATEGORY_NO AND USE_YN = 'Y' )
AND ( p.PRODUCT_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' OR p.PRODUCT_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' OR p.LOCATION LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' OR c1.CATEGORY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' OR c2.CATEGORY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' OR c3.CATEGORY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' )
AND p.LOCATION LIKE '%' || #{location} || '%'
AND p.STATUS = #{status}
AND p.PRICE <= 30000
AND p.PRICE > 30000 AND p.PRICE <= 100000
AND p.PRICE > 100000 AND p.PRICE <= 300000
AND p.PRICE > 300000

choose.when: ORDER BY p.PRICE ASC, p.CREATE_DT DESC
ORDER BY p.PRICE DESC, p.CREATE_DT DESC
ORDER BY p.VIEW_COUNT DESC, p.CREATE_DT DESC
ORDER BY p.VIEW_COUNT DESC, p.LIKE_CNT DESC, p.CHAT_CNT DESC, p.CREATE_DT DESC
ORDER BY (p.LIKE_CNT * 3 + p.CHAT_CNT * 2 + p.VIEW_COUNT) DESC, p.CREATE_DT DESC
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY p.CREATE_DT DESC, p.PRODUCT_NO DESC

mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PRODUCT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PRODUCT ( PRODUCT_NO, USER_NUM, CATEGORY_NO, PRODUCT_TITLE, PRODUCT_CONTENT, PRODUCT_CONDITION, PRICE, LOCATION, STATUS, ADMIN_HIDE_YN ) VALUES ( #{productNo}, #{userNum}, #{categoryNo}, #{productTitle}, #{productContent}, #{productCondition}, #{price}, #{location}, #{status}, 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE PRODUCT SET CATEGORY_NO = #{categoryNo}, PRODUCT_TITLE = #{productTitle}, PRODUCT_CONTENT = #{productContent}, PRODUCT_CONDITION = #{productCondition}, PRICE = #{price}, LOCATION = #{location}, STATUS = #{status}, MODIFY_DT = SYSDATE WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo} AND USER_NUM = #{userNum}
mapper.select:
SELECT p.PRODUCT_NO, p.USER_NUM, p.CATEGORY_NO, p.PRODUCT_TITLE, p.PRODUCT_CONTENT, p.PRODUCT_CONDITION, p.PRICE, p.LOCATION, p.STATUS, p.ADMIN_HIDE_YN, p.HIDE_REASON, p.VIEW_COUNT, TO_CHAR(p.CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_DT_TEXT, TO_CHAR(p.MODIFY_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS MODIFY_DT_TEXT, p.LIKE_CNT, p.CHAT_CNT, c1.CATEGORY_NAME AS LARGE_NAME, c2.CATEGORY_NAME AS MIDDLE_NAME, c3.CATEGORY_NAME AS SMALL_NAME FROM PRODUCT p
WHERE p.PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo} AND p.ADMIN_HIDE_YN = 'N'
SELECT PRODUCT_NO, PRODUCT_TITLE, PRICE, STATUS, TO_CHAR(CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREATE_DT_TEXT FROM PRODUCT ORDER BY CREATE_DT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE PRODUCT SET CHAT_CNT = CHAT_CNT - 1 WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo} AND CHAT_CNT > 0
